channel.title: POLITICO Influence
channel.description: Delivered daily, Influence gives you a comprehensive rundown and analysis of all lobby hires and news on K Street.

item.title: Akin adds Dem investigations guru
item.description: Marcus Childress, a veteran of some of Congress’ most high-profile investigations of recent years, has joined Akin Gump Strauss Hauer & Feld.
item.dc:creator: By Caitlin Oprysko and Daniel Barnes
item.dc:contributor: By Caitlin Oprysko and Daniel Barnes

item.title: Continental adds a Vance aide
item.description: Continental Strategy, the fast-growing lobbying shop known for its deep ties to Secretary of State Marco Rubio, has hired a former aide to Vice President JD Vance.
item.dc:creator: By Caitlin Oprysko and Daniel Barnes
item.dc:contributor: By Caitlin Oprysko and Daniel Barnes

item.title: Hemp industry hires more help
item.description: The hemp industry has continued to grow its presence in Washington as it attempts to delay or reverse an impending ban on the sale of THC products derived from legal hemp, according to newly filed disclosure reports.
item.dc:creator: By Daniel Barnes and Caitlin Oprysko
item.dc:contributor: By Daniel Barnes and Caitlin Oprysko

item.title: Lessons from ‘The Law Firm Crisis’
item.description: A new report, “The Law Firm Crisis: Lessons & Recommendations,” is based on nearly 30 interviews with current and former lawyers at firms involved in last year’s pressure campaign by the Trump administration.
item.dc:creator: By Daniel Barnes and Caitlin Oprysko
item.dc:contributor: By Daniel Barnes and Caitlin Oprysko

item.title: A guide to the Mullin alumni on K Street
item.description: Sen. Markwayne Mullin appears on his way to confirmation as DHS secretary, in spite of some intraparty tension and sharp questioning in his confirmation hearing.
item.dc:creator: By Caitlin Oprysko and Daniel Barnes
item.dc:contributor: By Caitlin Oprysko and Daniel Barnes

item.title: Should companies be disclosing their ballroom donations?
item.description: Watchdog group Campaign for Accountability is pressing federal lobbying regulators for clarity about whether financial support for White House pet projects like President Donald Trump’s ballroom construction should be subject to lobbying disclosure requirements.
item.dc:creator: By Caitlin Oprysko and Daniel Barnes
item.dc:contributor: By Caitlin Oprysko and Daniel Barnes

item.title: Another Checkmate move
item.description: Checkmate Government Relations has hired Rep. Richard Hudson’s chief of staff to be the first leader of the fast-growing firm’s congressional lobbying practice.
item.dc:creator: By Daniel Barnes and Caitlin Oprysko
item.dc:contributor: By Daniel Barnes and Caitlin Oprysko

item.title: Canada hires Cogent to help ‘maximize’ its social media influence in the US
item.description: The Canadian Embassy in Washington has hired Cogent Strategies to perform an assessment of the U.S. social media landscape.
item.dc:creator: By Daniel Barnes and Caitlin Oprysko
item.dc:contributor: By Daniel Barnes and Caitlin Oprysko

item.title: HPE exec met with Pentagon, CIA and DOJ officials in lead-up to merger settlement
item.description: An executive from Hewlett Packard Enterprise met with senior officials at the Defense Department, CIA and DOJ in the days and weeks leading up to DOJ’s decision to settle a lawsuit that sought to block a merger between HPE and Juniper Networks.
item.dc:creator: By Daniel Barnes and Caitlin Oprysko
item.dc:contributor: By Daniel Barnes and Caitlin Oprysko

item.title: Narrative adds FTC comms alum
item.description: Narrative Strategies has hired Chris Bissex, a top former comms strategist at the FTC, as a managing director.
item.dc:creator: By Caitlin Oprysko and Daniel Barnes
item.dc:contributor: By Caitlin Oprysko and Daniel Barnes

item.title: Another Trump ally in the Warner Bros. fray
item.description: GOP fundraiser Jeff Miller is the latest member of Trump world to get pulled into the lobbying frenzy over acquiring Warner Bros. Discovery.
item.dc:creator: By Caitlin Oprysko and Daniel Barnes
item.dc:contributor: By Caitlin Oprysko and Daniel Barnes

item.title: K Street gains another ‘Big Beautiful Bill’ alum
item.dc:creator: By Caitlin Oprysko and Daniel Barnes
item.dc:contributor: By Caitlin Oprysko and Daniel Barnes

item.title: Marijuana company hires Ballard for patent dispute
item.description: California-based marijauna company Stiiizy has hired Washington lobbyists for the first time.
item.dc:creator: By Daniel Barnes and Caitlin Oprysko
item.dc:contributor: By Daniel Barnes and Caitlin Oprysko

item.title: Trump DOE vet heads downtown
item.dc:creator: By Daniel Barnes and Caitlin Oprysko
item.dc:contributor: By Daniel Barnes and Caitlin Oprysko

item.title: Precision Strategies acquires Firehouse
item.description: Democratic public affairs powerhouse Precision Strategies has acquired the strategic comms shop Firehouse Strategies, bringing the senior leaders of multiple presidential campaigns — on both sides of the aisle — together under one roof.
item.dc:creator: By Caitlin Oprysko and Daniel Barnes
item.dc:contributor: By Caitlin Oprysko and Daniel Barnes

item.title: Here's where K Street sent its money in the Texas Dem Senate primary
item.description: Today’s primary elections in Texas feature a number of heated races, but the marquee contests revolve around the fight for the Senate.
item.dc:creator: By Caitlin Oprysko and Daniel Barnes
item.dc:contributor: By Caitlin Oprysko and Daniel Barnes

item.title: The Iranian ‘parliament-in-exile’ primed for this moment
item.description: No one in Washington has prepared for this moment as long as the Mojahedin-e-Khalq.
item.dc:creator: By Caitlin Oprysko and Daniel Barnes
item.dc:contributor: By Caitlin Oprysko and Daniel Barnes

item.title: Meet the new TikTok, same as the old TikTok
item.description: The new American-owned version of TikTok has registered to lobby and appears to be continuing to focus on the same issues as its former parent company ByteDance.
item.dc:creator: By Daniel Barnes and Caitlin Oprysko
item.dc:contributor: By Daniel Barnes and Caitlin Oprysko

item.title: Pennsylvania Dem candidate’s bank ties come under scrutiny in top House race
item.description: Republicans are poised to make the Democratic mayor of Scranton, Pennsylvania’s support for a local bank a top issue in one of the nation’s most competitive House races.
item.dc:creator: By Daniel Lippman, Daniel Barnes and Caitlin Oprysko
item.dc:contributor: By Daniel Lippman, Daniel Barnes and Caitlin Oprysko

item.title: Another White House aide heads downtown
item.description: Taylor LaJoie has left the White House, where he most recently served in the legislative affairs office, to join Alpine Group as a vice president.
item.dc:creator: By Caitlin Oprysko and Daniel Barnes
item.dc:contributor: By Caitlin Oprysko and Daniel Barnes

item.title: Downtown has some ideas for Trump on affordability
item.description: When President Donald Trump takes the stage tonight for the first State of the Union address of his second term, there are a slew of issues the business community will be looking to hear from him on.
item.dc:creator: By Caitlin Oprysko and Daniel Barnes
item.dc:contributor: By Caitlin Oprysko and Daniel Barnes

item.title: K Street’s tariff work is far from over
item.description: There’s still immense interest from the business community about where trade policy goes from here.
item.dc:creator: By Caitlin Oprysko and Daniel Barnes
item.dc:contributor: By Caitlin Oprysko and Daniel Barnes

item.title: Tariffs struck down but trade fights continue
item.description: President Donald Trump’s sweeping tariffs are no longer in effect.
item.dc:creator: By Daniel Barnes and Caitlin Oprysko
item.dc:contributor: By Daniel Barnes and Caitlin Oprysko

item.title: Crypto optimistic for compromise with banks
item.description: Cryptocurrency companies and big banks may finally be approaching a compromise on stablecoin yield payments.
item.dc:creator: By Daniel Barnes and Caitlin Oprysko
item.dc:contributor: By Daniel Barnes and Caitlin Oprysko

item.title: TelevisaUnivision, Versant tap new DC chiefs
item.description: A pair of prominent media outlets have new leaders for their government relations shops in D.C. TelevisaUnivision has tapped Bernadette Carrillo to lead its D.C. office as senior vice president of government relations.
item.dc:creator: By Caitlin Oprysko and Daniel Barnes
item.dc:contributor: By Caitlin Oprysko and Daniel Barnes

item.title: K Street snags another Hill tax aide
item.description: Cozen O’Connor Public Strategies has added Sean Clerget as a senior principal.
item.dc:creator: By Caitlin Oprysko and Daniel Barnes
item.dc:contributor: By Caitlin Oprysko and Daniel Barnes

item.title: Swiss billionaire’s nonprofit funding at issue in Nebraska House race
item.description: Allegations of foreign influence have entered the crowded Nebraska race to replace retiring GOP centrist Rep. Don Bacon.
item.dc:creator: By Daniel Lippman
item.dc:contributor: By Daniel Lippman

item.title: K Street mines critical minerals
item.dc:creator: By Marcia Brown
item.dc:contributor: By Marcia Brown

item.title: America First Policy Institute buys $20M DC building
item.description: The Trump-aligned America First Policy Institute (AFPI) bought the historic Colorado Building at 14th and G NW — massively expanding its footprint in Washington just steps away from the White House.
item.dc:creator: By Alex Gangitano
item.dc:contributor: By Alex Gangitano

item.title: Shapiro stepping down as CTA chief
item.description: The Consumer Technology Association’s Gary Shapiro is stepping down as CEO of the trade group after 35 years at the helm.
item.dc:creator: By Caitlin Oprysko
item.dc:contributor: By Caitlin Oprysko
